name: Dr. Shankar. K
info: Service is always selfless and it begins from the mindset of thinking about others. Hence, the moto of NSS is set as NOT ME BUT YOU.

We, the National Service Scheme (NSS) of NIT Silchar, are keen in bringing the positive changes in minds of everyone in and around the campus. NSS-NITS believes in doing rather than preaching; our dedicated volunteers are involving themselves in the activities start from education to health, fitness to cleanliness and environment to Biodiversity. In addition, we regularly visit nearby villages to make the people aware of health and other Govt. schemes.
We understand, the sky is the limit: Let's expand and extend our good thoughts to create inclusive surroundings.
Read good! Think good! Act good!

name: Dr. Prosun Mandal
info: The motto of the National Service Scheme (NSS) is NOT ME, BUT YOU. This reflects the essence of democratic living, emphasizing selfless service, respect for diverse perspectives, and consideration for fellow human beings. It highlights the idea that an individual's well-being is ultimately linked to the welfare of society as a whole. Therefore, it should be the mission of NSS to embody this motto in its day-to-day activities.

Perfection cannot be achieved without practice—this holds true for both academics and life. Positive qualities such as love, compassion, and empathy must be nurtured to become fulfilled and blessed individuals. One of the best ways to cultivate these values is through selfless service to others. NSS provides a platform where we can contribute to society without expecting anything in return.

Through NSS, volunteers not only help the community but also develop a deeper understanding of the society in which they work. They learn to identify social issues, recognize the needs of the people, and embrace their social and civic responsibilities.
They alone live who live for others, the rest are more dead than alive.

name: Dr. Rajesh Saha
info: To our amazing NSS volunteers, your commitment and passion for serving the community are truly inspiring.
Every step you take in helping others reflects the core values of selfless service, empathy, and dedication.

You are the heartbeat of our initiatives, and your hard work is creating real, positive change. Remember, the impact you make, no matter how small it may seem, ripples out and touches countless lives.
Keep moving forward with pride and purpose—you are not just volunteers, you are the driving force behind a brighter, better world.
Volunteers do not necessarily have the time, they just have the heart.

name: M Ashutosh
info: The NSS unit of NIT Silchar is a dynamic community devoted to social responsibility and meaningful change. Through initiatives like health camps, environmental drives, and awareness campaigns, our volunteers actively contribute to society while building essential skills such as leadership, teamwork, and empathy.

We believe in the power of collective action to create lasting impact. The NSS experience at NIT Silchar goes beyond volunteering—it shapes compassionate, socially conscious individuals who are dedicated to serving others and building a brighter, more inclusive future.
Empowering communities and inspiring change through selfless service.
